meaning: 伊斯帕尼奥拉岛[拉丁美洲西印度群岛中部](即海地岛)
examples: The Puerto Rican twig species closely resembles the twig species of Cuba, Hispaniola, and Jamaica in morphology, habitat use, and behavior.
Columbus also explored nearby Cuba and Hispaniola before returning to Spain.
Only five of the men who had sailed from Bristol with the Hispaniola returned with her.
Since it was discovered by Columbus in 1492, Hispaniola has known great wealth and deep poverty.
Ever since Christopher Columbus landed on the island of Hispaniola in 1492, Haiti's history has been brutal.
